cv_text: LêTrọngNhân Sales Executive Dob:24/05/2005 Gender:Male Phone:0397609967 Email:nhanle221199@gmail.com GitHub:Lenhan231 (Le Trong Nhan) Address:Ho Chi Minh OBJECTIVE Data Engineering-focused student with strong foundation in Python and SQL, building end-to-end data pipelines and working with structured datasets. Experienced in ETL workflows, data modeling, and pipeline orchestration through academic and personal projects. Interested in scalable data systems and real-time processing. EDUCATION 2023-Present FPT University Bachelor of Artificial Intelligence GPA: 3.4/4 WORK EXPERIENCE August 2025-December 2025 Amazon Web Services (AWS) AWS First Cloud Journey Internship 2025 Engaged in a technical On-the-Job Training program focused on Cloud Computing and Web Technologies, gaining hands-on experience with cloud platforms, web infrastructure, and deployment workflows. PROJECTS May 2026-Present Real-Estate-Valuation Data Engineer Developed automated web scraping pipelines for real-estate listing collection across multiple property sources. Built scheduling and crawling workflows for rotating locations and property types. Designed ETL pipelines for data cleaning, transformation, and feature engineering to support ML model training. Integrated processed datasets into dashboards and analytics workflows for valuation insights. Technologies: Python, BeautifulSoup, Selenium, Pandas, SQLite/MySQL, Scheduling Automation. CERTIFICATIONS 2023 English — IELTS 6.0 (Academic) HONORS & AWARDS 2023 FPT University Merit Scholarship — 30% Tuition Reduction SKILLS Programming: Python, SQL Data Engineering: ETL/ELT pipelines, data cleaning, batch processing Tools & Frameworks: Pandas Databases: MySQL (SQL), DynamoDB (NoSQL) Cloud (basic): AWS S3 Language Skills: English, Japanese (JLPT N4 Candidate) Others: Git, Docker (basic), Linux INTERESTS Reading (technology, economics, and personal development) Strength Training and Fitness
job_text: Your Adventure Ahead: Build and maintain data models and pipelines using Spark and Apache Airflow. Learn to design and optimize HUDI and Iceberg tables for performance and reliability. Write and validate SQL transformations consumed in Trino and Metabase. Collaborate with senior engineers to improve data quality and observability. Use AI tools (e.g., ChatGPT, Cursor, Claude Code) to assist coding and documentation, and learn how to verify their output. Document learnings and share improvements through Confluence and Slack. What You Will Learn: How modern data lakehouses (Spark + Iceberg + Trino) work in production. Building reliable, testable dbt models on top of large datasets. End-to-end flow: ingestion → transformation → analytics. Practical debugging, observability, and version control in a real system. How to collaborate effectively in a hybrid engineering team. Essentials To Succeed: Strong interest in data engineering or data systems. Familiarity with Python and SQL (school projects or self-taught is fine). Curiosity about data pipelines, storage formats, and data quality. Comfort experimenting with AI coding assistants responsibly. Clear communication, asks questions early, shares progress regularly. Bonus: exposure to AWS, dbt, Spark, or Trino
